click — no per-tenant app registration needed.

Bash(git -C /Users/tech/sibergroup/chat commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
Add vercel.json to set Next.js framework preset

Vercel was using ''Other'' framework preset, causing 404s.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF

Bash(git -C /Users/tech/sibergroup/chat commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
Fix MSAL initialization to handle redirect auth response

Initialize MSAL instance and call handleRedirectPromise\(\)
before rendering, so auth codes in the URL hash are properly
processed after login.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")

Bash(git -C /Users/tech/sibergroup/chat commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
Switch from popup to redirect auth flow

Popup auth was being blocked by browsers. Redirect flow is
more reliable - redirects to Microsoft login page and back.
Also cleans up auth code hash from URL after handling.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")

Bash(git -C /Users/tech/sibergroup/chat commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
Switch to popup login and add responsive design for phone/tablet

- Popup auth flow instead of redirect for cleaner UX
- Responsive layout for phone \(360-415px\) and tablet \(600-700px\)
- Smaller text, padding, buttons on mobile screens
- Hide avatar on phone, show on tablet+
- Wider message bubbles on small screens \(95% vs 85%\)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")

Bash(git -C /Users/tech/sibergroup/chat commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
Always call handleRedirectPromise to clear stale MSAL state

The block_nested_popups error was caused by stale interaction
state in localStorage from previous failed attempts. Now we
always call handleRedirectPromise\(\) and catch the stale cache
error gracefully, so the popup flow works cleanly.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")

Bash(git -C /Users/tech/sibergroup/chat commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
Fix popup login with lightweight redirect page

The full app was loading in the popup window, causing
redirect_bridge_timeout. Now the popup uses a blank
redirect.html page so MSAL can quickly process the
auth response and close the popup.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")

Bash(git -C /Users/tech/sibergroup/chat commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
Replace static redirect.html with Next.js redirect page

MSAL v5 popup flow uses BroadcastChannel for communication
between popup and main window. The popup needs MSAL v5
loaded and initialized to send the auth response back.
Created a proper Next.js page at /redirect that imports
the same MSAL instance and calls handleRedirectPromise\(\).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")

Bash(git -C /Users/tech/sibergroup/chat commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
Use empty static redirect.html for popup auth

Next.js was modifying the URL hash during page hydration,
preventing MSAL from reading the auth code. Switched to a
completely empty static HTML page with no JavaScript.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")

Bash(git -C /Users/tech/sibergroup/chat commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
Popup login with redirect fallback

Try popup first, if it fails \(bridge timeout, blocked popups\)
automatically fall back to redirect flow for reliable login.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")
